chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-1594 of 2023 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders on M.A. 7454/2024 30.10.2024 Mr. Waheed Ahmed Awan Advocate for Petitioner. Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto, Addl. A.G Sindh. ----- Urgency is granted. There is a short controversy involved that Petitioner wants his Application pending before the Respondent No.1 be decided. Learned AAG present in Court in other matters, has no objection, if Application is still pending. This Petition is disposed of by directing the Respondent No.1 to decide the Application of Petitioner as per Law and Rules after giving opportunity of hearing. JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
